title: opt_expr to trim A port of $shiftx/$shift
body:
Specifically, if MSB of A port is `1'bx`:
```
  cell $shiftx \shiftx
    parameter signed \Y_WIDTH 1
    parameter signed \B_WIDTH 2
    parameter signed \A_WIDTH 4
    parameter signed \B_SIGNED 0
    parameter signed \A_SIGNED 0
    connect \Y \y
    connect \B \b
    connect \A { 1'x \a }
  end
```
code_blocks:
cell $shiftx \shiftx
    parameter signed \Y_WIDTH 1
    parameter signed \B_WIDTH 2
    parameter signed \A_WIDTH 4
    parameter signed \B_SIGNED 0
    parameter signed \A_SIGNED 0
    connect \Y \y
    connect \B \b
    connect \A { 1'x \a }
  end
